```{=html}
            <div><span style="background:rgba(239,83,80,0.2);color:#EF5350;border:1px solid #EF5350;padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:4px;font-size:0.85em;">🔴 ลับมาก</span></div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:0.3em;">
              <span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);color:#B0BEC5;padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:4px;font-size:0.85em;">👥 HR</span>
              <span style="background:rgba(255,179,0,0.2);color:#FFB300;border:1px solid #FFB300;padding:0.15em 0.4em;border-radius:4px;font-size:0.85em;">⚠️ PII</span>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div style="padding:0.5em;border-radius:6px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1.2fr 1.2fr;align-items:center;">
            <div style="color:#E0E0E0;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">📝 Board_Meeting_Apr2025.docx</div>
            <div><span style="background:rgba(255,167,38,0.2);color:#FFA726;border:1px solid #FFA726;padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:4px;font-size:0.85em;">🟡 ภายใน</span></div>
            <div><span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);color:#B0BEC5;padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:4px;font-size:0.85em;">🤝 Meeting</span></div>
          </div>

          <div style="background:rgba(239,83,80,0.05);padding:0.5em;border-radius:6px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1.2fr 1.2fr;align-items:center;">
            <div style="color:#E0E0E0;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">📊 1212_Complaint_Q1.csv</div>
            <div><span style="background:rgba(239,83,80,0.2);color:#EF5350;border:1px solid #EF5350;padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:4px;font-size:0.85em;">🔴 ลับมาก</span></div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:0.3em;">
              <span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);color:#B0BEC5;padding:0.15em 0.4em;border-radius:4px;font-size:0.85em;">💬 1212</span>
              <span style="background:rgba(255,179,0,0.2);color:#FFB300;border:1px solid #FFB300;padding:0.15em 0.4em;border-radius:4px;font-size:0.85em;">⚠️ PII</span>
            </div>
          </div>

        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Right: Stats -->
      <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.8em;">

        <div style="background:#060e1e;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);padding:0.9em;border-radius:8px;">
          <div style="color:#FFF;margin-bottom:0.5em;font-weight:700;font-size:0.95em;">🛡️ Sensitivity Distribution</div>
          <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.4em;font-size:0.85em;">
            <div>
              <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;color:#EF5350;margin-bottom:0.15em;"><span>🔴 ลับมาก</span><span>15%</span></div>
              <div style="background:#1a2a40;border-radius:3px;height:7px;"><div style="width:15%;height:100%;background:#EF5350;border-radius:3px;"></div></div>
            </div>
            <div>
              <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;color:#FFA726;margin-bottom:0.15em;"><span>🟡 ภายใน</span><span>52%</span></div>
              <div style="background:#1a2a40;border-radius:3px;height:7px;"><div style="width:52%;height:100%;background:#FFA726;border-radius:3px;"></div></div>
            </div>
            <div>
              <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;color:#00BCD4;margin-bottom:0.15em;"><span>🔵 ทั่วไป</span><span>33%</span></div>
              <div style="background:#1a2a40;border-radius:3px;height:7px;"><div style="width:33%;height:100%;background:#00BCD4;border-radius:3px;"></div></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style="background:#060e1e;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);padding:0.9em;border-radius:8px;">
          <div style="color:#FFF;margin-bottom:0.6em;font-weight:700;font-size:0.95em;">🏷️ Data Domains Detected</div>
          <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.4em;font-size:0.82em;">
            <span style="background:rgba(0,188,212,0.1);color:#00BCD4;padding:0.2em 0.5em;border-radius:4px;">💰 Finance 24%</span>
            <span style="background:rgba(0,188,212,0.1);color:#00BCD4;padding:0.2em 0.5em;border-radius:4px;">⚖️ Policy 18%</span>
            <span style="background:rgba(0,188,212,0.1);color:#00BCD4;padding:0.2em 0.5em;border-radius:4px;">👥 HR 15%</span>
            <span style="background:rgba(0,188,212,0.1);color:#00BCD4;padding:0.2em 0.5em;border-radius:4px;">🤝 Meeting 20%</span>
            <span style="background:rgba(0,188,212,0.1);color:#00BCD4;padding:0.2em 0.5em;border-radius:4px;">💬 1212 8%</span>
            <span style="background:rgba(255,179,0,0.15);color:#FFB300;padding:0.2em 0.5em;border-radius:4px;">⚠️ PII Detected</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style="background:rgba(0,230,118,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.3);padding:0.9em;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;">
          <div style="font-size:2.5em;font-weight:800;color:#00E676;line-height:1;">94.2%</div>
          <div style="color:#FFF;font-size:0.85em;margin-top:0.3em;">NLP Accuracy</div>
          <div style="color:#78909C;font-size:0.78em;">Thai Language Model</div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ════ PANEL 2: RETENTION ════ -->
  <div id="panel-mock-2" style="display:none;padding:1.2em;height:100%;box-sizing:border-box;">
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:0.8em;">
      <div style="font-size:1.2em;font-weight:700;color:#FFF;">⏳ Automated Retention Engine</div>
      <span style="background:#1E88E5;color:#FFF;padding:0.3em 1em;border-radius:4px;font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;">+ สร้างเงื่อนไขใหม่</span>
    </div>
    <div style="color:#B0BEC5;margin-bottom:0.6em;font-size:0.88em;">
      เมื่อระบบพบเงื่อนไข <strong style="color:#1E88E5;">(IF)</strong> จะดำเนินการอัตโนมัติ <strong style="color:#00E676;">(THEN)</strong>
    </div>

    <div style="background:#060e1e;border:1px solid #1a2a40;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:0.6em;">
      <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.85em;">
        <tr style="background:rgba(30,136,229,0.12);color:#00BCD4;">
          <th style="padding:0.6em 0.8em;text-align:left;border-bottom:1px solid #1a2a40;width:36%;">IF: เงื่อนไขที่ตรวจพบ</th>
          <th style="padding:0.6em 0.8em;text-align:left;border-bottom:1px solid #1a2a40;width:36%;">THEN: ดำเนินการ</th>
          <th style="padding:0.6em 0.8em;text-align:center;border-bottom:1px solid #1a2a40;width:12%;">Status</th>
          <th style="padding:0.6em 0.8em;text-align:right;border-bottom:1px solid #1a2a40;">ไฟล์</th>
        </tr>
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);background:rgba(239,83,80,0.04);">
          <td style="padding:0.55em 0.8em;"><span style="color:#EF5350;">🔴 Confidential</span> <span style="color:#78909C;">AND อายุ</span> <span style="color:#FFB300;">> 7 ปี</span></td>
          <td style="padding:0.55em 0.8em;color:#FFB300;">📦 Archive + Notify CISO</td>
          <td style="padding:0.55em 0.8em;text-align:center;color:#00E676;font-weight:700;">● Active</td>
          <td style="padding:0.55em 0.8em;text-align:right;color:#E0E0E0;">45,230</td>
        </tr>
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);">
          <td style="padding:0.55em 0.8em;"><span style="color:#FFA726;">🟡 Internal</span> <span style="color:#78909C;">AND อายุ</span> <span style="color:#FFB300;">> 3 ปี</span></td>
          <td style="padding:0.55em 0.8em;color:#FFB300;">📦 Archive Storage</td>
          <td style="padding:0.55em 0.8em;text-align:center;color:#00E676;font-weight:700;">● Active</td>
          <td style="padding:0.55em 0.8em;text-align:right;color:#E0E0E0;">312,500</td>
        </tr>
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);background:rgba(0,188,212,0.03);">
          <td style="padding:0.55em 0.8em;"><span style="color:#00BCD4;">🔵 Public</span> <span style="color:#78909C;">AND อายุ</span> <span style="color:#FFB300;">> 5 ปี</span></td>
          <td style="padding:0.55em 0.8em;color:#EF5350;">🗑️ Hard Delete + Audit Log</td>
          <td style="padding:0.55em 0.8em;text-align:center;color:#00E676;font-weight:700;">● Active</td>
          <td style="padding:0.55em 0.8em;text-align:right;color:#E0E0E0;">180,000</td>
        </tr>
        <tr style="background:rgba(124,77,255,0.04);">
          <td style="padding:0.55em 0.8em;"><span style="color:#7C4DFF;">⚠️ PII + No Encrypt</span></td>
          <td style="padding:0.55em 0.8em;color:#EF5350;">🔒 Force Encrypt + Alert</td>
          <td style="padding:0.55em 0.8em;text-align:center;color:#00E676;font-weight:700;">● Active</td>
          <td style="padding:0.55em 0.8em;text-align:right;color:#EF5350;">124 🚨</td>
        </tr>
      </table>
    </div>

    <!-- Timeline bar -->
    <div style="background:#060e1e;border:1px solid #1a2a40;border-radius:6px;padding:0.5em 0.8em;">
      <div style="color:#B0BEC5;font-size:0.82em;margin-bottom:0.3em;">📅 Action ที่จะเกิดขึ้นใน 30 วันข้างหน้า</div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:0.3em;height:22px;">
        <div style="flex:2;background:#EF5350;border-radius:3px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.75em;color:#FFF;">Archive 3,240 ไฟล์</div>
        <div style="flex:1;background:#FFA726;border-radius:3px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.75em;color:#0A1628;">Review 1,120</div>
        <div style="flex:1;background:#EF5350;border-radius:3px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.75em;color:#FFF;">Delete 890</div>
        <div style="flex:4;background:#1565C0;border-radius:3px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.75em;color:#FFF;">ไม่ต้อง Action 8,240 ไฟล์</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ════ PANEL 3: CATALOG ════ -->
  <div id="panel-mock-3" style="display:none;padding:1.2em;height:100%;box-sizing:border-box;flex-direction:column;">
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:0.8em;align-items:center;">
      <div style="font-size:1.2em;font-weight:700;color:#FFF;">📋 ETDA Data Catalog</div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:0.5em;">
        <input type="text" placeholder="🔍 ค้นหา: 1212, Digital ID, นโยบาย..." style="width:280px;padding:0.4em 0.9em;border-radius:20px;border:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.4);background:#060e1e;color:#FFF;outline:none;font-size:0.85em;">
        <select style="background:#060e1e;border:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.3);border-radius:6px;color:#C0CDD8;padding:0.3em;font-size:0.82em;">
          <option>ทุกหมวด</option><option>🔴 Confidential</option><option>🟡 Internal</option><option>🔵 Public</option>
        </select>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- KPI Mini -->
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.4em;margin-bottom:0.6em;font-size:0.82em;">
      <div style="background:#060e1e;border:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.2);border-radius:6px;padding:0.4em;text-align:center;"><span style="font-size:1.4em;font-weight:800;color:#00BCD4;">950K</span><br><span style="color:#78909C;">ไฟล์ทั้งหมด</span></div>
      <div style="background:#060e1e;border:1px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.2);border-radius:6px;padding:0.4em;text-align:center;"><span style="font-size:1.4em;font-weight:800;color:#00E676;">68%</span><br><span style="color:#78909C;">Labelled</span></div>
      <div style="background:#060e1e;border:1px solid rgba(255,167,38,0.2);border-radius:6px;padding:0.4em;text-align:center;"><span style="font-size:1.4em;font-weight:800;color:#FFA726;">42</span><br><span style="color:#78909C;">Data Owners</span></div>
      <div style="background:#060e1e;border:1px solid rgba(124,77,255,0.2);border-radius:6px;padding:0.4em;text-align:center;"><span style="font-size:1.4em;font-weight:800;color:#7C4DFF;">8</span><br><span style="color:#78909C;">หน่วยงาน</span></div>
    </div>

    <div style="background:#060e1e;border:1px solid #1a2a40;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;flex:1;">
      <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.82em;">
        <tr style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);color:#78909C;">
          <th style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;text-align:left;border-bottom:1px solid #1a2a40;">Asset Name</th>
          <th style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;border-bottom:1px solid #1a2a40;">Label</th>
          <th style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;text-align:left;border-bottom:1px solid #1a2a40;">Tags</th>
          <th style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;border-bottom:1px solid #1a2a40;">Owner</th>
          <th style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;border-bottom:1px solid #1a2a40;">Last Access</th>
          <th style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;border-bottom:1px solid #1a2a40;">Retention</th>
          <th style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;border-bottom:1px solid #1a2a40;">Status</th>
        </tr>
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);background:rgba(239,83,80,0.04);">
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;color:#FFF;font-weight:600;">📊 1212_Complaint_DB_2025.csv</td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;text-align:center;"><span style="color:#EF5350;background:rgba(239,83,80,0.15);padding:0.1em 0.4em;border-radius:3px;">🔴</span></td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;"><span style="background:rgba(255,179,0,0.15);color:#FFB300;padding:0.1em 0.3em;border-radius:3px;font-size:0.88em;">⚠️PII</span> <span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);color:#B0BEC5;padding:0.1em 0.3em;border-radius:3px;font-size:0.88em;">💬1212</span></td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;color:#00BCD4;">ฝ่ายร้องเรียน</td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;color:#00E676;">วันนี้</td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;color:#B0BEC5;">7 ปี</td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;color:#00E676;">✅ Active</td>
        </tr>
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);">
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;color:#FFF;font-weight:600;">📄 ETDA_Strategic_Plan_66-70.pdf</td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;text-align:center;"><span style="color:#00BCD4;background:rgba(0,188,212,0.15);padding:0.1em 0.4em;border-radius:3px;">🔵</span></td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;"><span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);color:#B0BEC5;padding:0.1em 0.3em;border-radius:3px;font-size:0.88em;">🎯 Strategy</span></td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;color:#00BCD4;">นโยบายและแผน</td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;color:#00E676;">3 วันที่แล้ว</td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;color:#B0BEC5;">5 ปี</td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;color:#00E676;">✅ Active</td>
        </tr>
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);background:rgba(255,167,38,0.03);">
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;color:#FFF;font-weight:600;">📁 Digital_ID_Usage_Logs_Q1/</td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;text-align:center;"><span style="color:#FFA726;background:rgba(255,167,38,0.15);padding:0.1em 0.4em;border-radius:3px;">🟡</span></td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;"><span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);color:#B0BEC5;padding:0.1em 0.3em;border-radius:3px;font-size:0.88em;">🪪 DigID</span> <span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);color:#B0BEC5;padding:0.1em 0.3em;border-radius:3px;font-size:0.88em;">⚙️ Log</span></td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;color:#00BCD4;">DAC Team</td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;color:#FFA726;">2 เดือนที่แล้ว</td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;color:#B0BEC5;">3 ปี</td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;color:#FFA726;">⚠️ Archive Soon</td>
        </tr>
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);">
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;color:#FFF;font-weight:600;">📊 e-Commerce_Survey_2024.xlsx</td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;text-align:center;"><span style="color:#FFA726;background:rgba(255,167,38,0.15);padding:0.1em 0.4em;border-radius:3px;">🟡</span></td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;"><span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);color:#B0BEC5;padding:0.1em 0.3em;border-radius:3px;font-size:0.88em;">📈 Stats</span></td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;color:#00BCD4;">ฝ่ายสถิติ</td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;color:#00E676;">1 สัปดาห์</td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;color:#B0BEC5;">3 ปี</td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;color:#00E676;">✅ Active</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;color:#FFF;font-weight:600;">📁 Server_Config_Backup/</td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;text-align:center;"><span style="color:#78909C;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.07);padding:0.1em 0.4em;border-radius:3px;">⚪</span></td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;"><span style="background:rgba(239,83,80,0.15);color:#EF5350;padding:0.1em 0.3em;border-radius:3px;font-size:0.88em;">🔑 Credential?</span></td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;color:#EF5350;">— ไม่ระบุ</td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;color:#EF5350;">3 ปีที่แล้ว</td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;color:#EF5350;">— ไม่มี</td>
          <td style="padding:0.5em 0.7em;color:#EF5350;">❌ No Policy</td>
        </tr>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ════ PANEL 4: DASHBOARD ════ -->
  <div id="panel-mock-4" style="display:none;padding:1.2em;height:100%;box-sizing:border-box;flex-direction:column;gap:0.8em;">
    <div style="font-size:1.2em;font-weight:700;color:#FFF;">📊 Executive Compliance & Risk Dashboard</div>

    <!-- KPI -->
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.7em;">
      <div style="background:rgba(0,230,118,0.1);border:1px solid #00E676;padding:0.9em;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
        <div style="font-size:2em;font-weight:800;color:#00E676;line-height:1;">85%</div>
        <div style="color:#FFF;font-size:0.82em;margin-top:0.3em;">Compliance Score</div>
        <div style="color:#00E676;font-size:0.75em;">▲ +12%</div>
      </div>
      <div style="background:rgba(239,83,80,0.1);border:1px solid #EF5350;padding:0.9em;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
        <div style="font-size:2em;font-weight:800;color:#EF5350;line-height:1;">124</div>
        <div style="color:#FFF;font-size:0.82em;margin-top:0.3em;">PII Exposure Risks</div>
        <div style="color:#FFA726;font-size:0.75em;">ต้องดำเนินการ</div>
      </div>
      <div style="background:rgba(124,77,255,0.1);border:1px solid #7C4DFF;padding:0.9em;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
        <div style="font-size:2em;font-weight:800;color:#7C4DFF;line-height:1;">1.8 TB</div>
        <div style="color:#FFF;font-size:0.82em;margin-top:0.3em;">Storage Reclaimed</div>
        <div style="color:#7C4DFF;font-size:0.75em;">ลด Cost 20%</div>
      </div>
      <div style="background:rgba(0,188,212,0.1);border:1px solid #00BCD4;padding:0.9em;border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">
        <div style="font-size:2em;font-weight:800;color:#00BCD4;line-height:1;">94%</div>
        <div style="color:#FFF;font-size:0.82em;margin-top:0.3em;">AI Label Coverage</div>
        <div style="color:#00BCD4;font-size:0.75em;">890K ไฟล์</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Charts -->
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.3fr 1fr;gap:0.7em;flex:1;">
      <div style="background:#060e1e;border:1px solid #1a2a40;border-radius:8px;padding:0.8em;">
        <div style="color:#B0BEC5;font-weight:700;font-size:0.88em;margin-bottom:0.5em;">🏢 Compliance by Department</div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.45em;font-size:0.82em;">
          <div><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;color:#C0CDD8;margin-bottom:0.12em;"><span>DAC (Data Services)</span><span style="color:#00E676;">92%</span></div><div style="background:#1a2a40;border-radius:3px;height:7px;"><div style="width:92%;height:100%;background:#00E676;border-radius:3px;"></div></div></div>
          <div><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;color:#C0CDD8;margin-bottom:0.12em;"><span>Legal</span><span style="color:#00BCD4;">85%</span></div><div style="background:#1a2a40;border-radius:3px;height:7px;"><div style="width:85%;height:100%;background:#00BCD4;border-radius:3px;"></div></div></div>
          <div><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;color:#C0CDD8;margin-bottom:0.12em;"><span>IT & Security</span><span style="color:#FFA726;">71%</span></div><div style="background:#1a2a40;border-radius:3px;height:7px;"><div style="width:71%;height:100%;background:#FFA726;border-radius:3px;"></div></div></div>
          <div><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;color:#C0CDD8;margin-bottom:0.12em;"><span>Research & Stats</span><span style="color:#FFA726;">63%</span></div><div style="background:#1a2a40;border-radius:3px;height:7px;"><div style="width:63%;height:100%;background:#FFA726;border-radius:3px;"></div></div></div>
          <div><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;color:#C0CDD8;margin-bottom:0.12em;"><span>1212 Call Center</span><span style="color:#EF5350;">45%</span></div><div style="background:#1a2a40;border-radius:3px;height:7px;"><div style="width:45%;height:100%;background:#EF5350;border-radius:3px;"></div></div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="background:#060e1e;border:1px solid #1a2a40;border-radius:8px;padding:0.8em;">
        <div style="color:#B0BEC5;font-weight:700;font-size:0.88em;margin-bottom:0.5em;">🤖 Automation Activity Log</div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.3em;font-size:0.80em;">
          <div style="padding:0.3em 0;border-bottom:1px solid #1a2a40;color:#00BCD4;">🤖 Auto-labelled 342 ไฟล์ใหม่</div>
          <div style="padding:0.3em 0;border-bottom:1px solid #1a2a40;color:#FFA726;">📦 Archived 156 ไฟล์ครบ Retention</div>
          <div style="padding:0.3em 0;border-bottom:1px solid #1a2a40;color:#00E676;">✅ Dedup ลบ 89 ไฟล์ (-2.3 GB)</div>
          <div style="padding:0.3em 0;border-bottom:1px solid #1a2a40;color:#EF5350;">⚠️ PII 12 ไฟล์ไม่มี Encrypt</div>
          <div style="padding:0.3em 0;color:#7C4DFF;">🔒 Force Encrypt .ppk 8 ไฟล์</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
</div>

<script>
function resetPanels() {
  document.getElementById('panel-mock-1').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('panel-mock-2').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('panel-mock-3').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('panel-mock-4').style.display = 'none';
}
function changeMockup(index) {
  resetPanels();
  const colors = {1:'#7C4DFF',2:'#1E88E5',3:'#00BCD4',4:'#00E676'};
  const rgbs   = {1:'124,77,255',2:'30,136,229',3:'0,188,212',4:'0,230,118'};
  for (let i = 1; i <= 4; i++) {
    document.getElementById('btn-mock-' + i).style.border = '2px solid transparent';
    document.getElementById('btn-mock-' + i).style.background = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)';
  }
  let p = document.getElementById('panel-mock-' + index);
  p.style.display = (index === 3 || index === 4) ? 'flex' : 'block';
  document.getElementById('btn-mock-' + index).style.border = '2px solid ' + colors[index];
  document.getElementById('btn-mock-' + index).style.background = 'rgba(' + rgbs[index] + ',0.2)';
}
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  resetPanels(); changeMockup(1);
});
</script>
```


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════ SLIDE 9: IMPLEMENTATION PLAN ════════════════════════════════ -->
## 📅 แผนการดำเนินงาน (Implementation Plan) {background-color="#0A1628"}

```{=html}
<style>
/* CSS สำหรับจัดการ Gantt Chart ให้อยู่ทรง */
.gantt-container {
  background: rgba(13,33,55,0.4);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  border-radius: 12px;
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
  font-family: 'Inter', 'Sarabun', sans-serif;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.gantt-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  table-layout: fixed;
}
.gantt-header-row th {
  padding: 0.8em 0;
  font-size: 0.65em;
  color: #78909C;
  font-weight: normal;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  border-left: 1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
  text-align: center;
}
.gantt-header-row th:first-child {
  border-left: none;
  text-align: left;
  padding-left: 1.5em;
}
.gantt-row {
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
}
.gantt-row:last-child {
  border-bottom: none;
}
.gantt-label-col {
  width: 28%;
  padding: 1em 1.5em;
  border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
}
.gantt-chart-col {
  width: 72%;
  position: relative;
}
/* Grid lines ข้างหลังบาร์ */
.gantt-grid {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
  display: flex;
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 0;
}
.gantt-grid div {
  flex: 1;
  border-left: 1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
}
.gantt-bar-area {
  position: relative;
  height: 100%;
  width: 100%;
  padding: 1.5em 0;
  z-index: 10;
}
/* ตัวบาร์สี */
.g-bar {
  position: absolute;
  height: 32px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 0.65em;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #FFF;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  white-space: nowrap;
}
/* สีแต่ละ Phase */
.bg-p1 { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #1565C0, #1E88E5); }
.bg-p2 { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #F57C00, #FFA726); color: #0A1628; }
.bg-p3 { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #5E35B1, #7C4DFF); }
.bg-p4 { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #00C853, #00E676); color: #0A1628; }
</style>

<div style="font-family:'Inter','Sarabun',sans-serif;display:flex;flex-direction:column;height:85%;">
  
  <div style="color:#B0BEC5;text-align:center;margin-bottom:1em;font-size:0.7em;">
    <strong style="color:#FFB300;">Roadmap 12 เดือน</strong>
  </div>

  <div class="gantt-container">
    <table class="gantt-table">
      <!-- หัวตาราง (เดือน) -->
      <tr class="gantt-header-row">
        <th style="width:28%;">Phases & Activities</th>
        <th>M1</th><th>M2</th><th>M3</th><th>M4</th><th>M5</th><th>M6</th>
        <th>M7</th><th>M8</th><th>M9</th><th>M10</th><th>M11</th><th>M12</th>
      </tr>

      <!-- Phase 1 -->
      <tr class="gantt-row">
        <td class="gantt-label-col">
          <strong style="color:#1E88E5;font-size:0.75em;display:block;margin-bottom:0.2em;">Phase 1 (เดือน 1-2)</strong>
          <div style="color:#FFF;font-weight:700;font-size:0.7em;">Discovery & Profiling</div>
          <div style="color:#8899aa;font-size:0.55em;margin-top:0.4em;line-height:1.4;">สำรวจแหล่งเก็บข้อมูล วิเคราะห์โครงสร้างข้อมูล และสร้าง Baseline Dashboard</div>
        </td>
        <td colspan="12" class="gantt-chart-col">
          <div class="gantt-grid">
            <div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div>
            <div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="gantt-bar-area">
            <!-- ซ้าย 0%, กว้าง 2 เดือน = 16.66% -->
            <div class="g-bar bg-p1" style="left:1%; width:15.66%;">Metadata & API</div>
          </div>
        </td>
      </tr>

      <!-- Phase 2 -->
      <tr class="gantt-row">
        <td class="gantt-label-col">
          <strong style="color:#FFA726;font-size:0.75em;display:block;margin-bottom:0.2em;">Phase 2 (เดือน 3-4)</strong>
          <div style="color:#FFF;font-weight:700;font-size:0.7em;">Data Cleanup</div>
          <div style="color:#8899aa;font-size:0.55em;margin-top:0.4em;line-height:1.4;">ลบไฟล์ซ้ำซ้อนด้วย Hash และนำร่องย้ายไฟล์เก่า (Archive) ลง Cold Storage</div>
        </td>
        <td colspan="12" class="gantt-chart-col">
          <div class="gantt-grid">
            <div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div>
            <div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="gantt-bar-area">
            <!-- ซ้าย 16.66%, กว้าง 2 เดือน = 16.66% -->
            <div class="g-bar bg-p2" style="left:17.66%; width:15.66%;">ETL & Deduplication</div>
          </div>
        </td>
      </tr>

      <!-- Phase 3 -->
      <tr class="gantt-row">
        <td class="gantt-label-col">
          <strong style="color:#7C4DFF;font-size:0.75em;display:block;margin-bottom:0.2em;">Phase 3 (เดือน 5-10)</strong>
          <div style="color:#FFF;font-weight:700;font-size:0.7em;">AI Auto-Classification</div>
          <div style="color:#8899aa;font-size:0.55em;margin-top:0.4em;line-height:1.4;">Train NLP ให้แยกชั้นความลับ (Public/Internal) และติดป้ายกำกับอัตโนมัติ</div>
        </td>
        <td colspan="12" class="gantt-chart-col">
          <div class="gantt-grid">
            <div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div>
            <div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="gantt-bar-area">
            <!-- ซ้าย 33.33%, กว้าง 6 เดือน = 50% -->
            <div class="g-bar bg-p3" style="left:34.33%; width:49%;">NLP Training & Auto-Labelling</div>
          </div>
        </td>
      </tr>

      <!-- Phase 4 -->
      <tr class="gantt-row">
        <td class="gantt-label-col">
          <strong style="color:#00E676;font-size:0.75em;display:block;margin-bottom:0.2em;">Phase 4 (เดือน 11-12)</strong>
          <div style="color:#FFF;font-weight:700;font-size:0.7em;">Data Catalog & Lifecycle</div>
          <div style="color:#8899aa;font-size:0.55em;margin-top:0.4em;line-height:1.4;">เปิดใช้งาน Catalog กลาง และ Dashboard ติดตามสถานะนโยบาย Real-time</div>
        </td>
        <td colspan="12" class="gantt-chart-col">
          <div class="gantt-grid">
            <div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div>
            <div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="gantt-bar-area">
            <!-- ซ้าย 83.33%, กว้าง 2 เดือน = 16.66% -->
            <div class="g-bar bg-p4" style="left:84.33%; width:14.66%;">Gov. Portal</div>
          </div>
        </td>
      </tr>

    </table>
  </div>
  
  <!-- Tools Stack (Footer) -->
  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:1.5em;margin-top:1.2em;font-size:0.65em;">
    <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);padding:0.4em 1.2em;border-radius:20px;color:#00BCD4;font-weight:700;">
      ⚙️ Tech Stack: Microsoft Graph API
    </div>
    <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);padding:0.4em 1.2em;border-radius:20px;color:#FFB300;font-weight:700;">
      🧠 AI: Python NLP & LLMs
    </div>
    <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);padding:0.4em 1.2em;border-radius:20px;color:#00E676;font-weight:700;">
      💰 Cost: Zero New Budget (ใช้ของเดิม ETDA)
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════ SLIDE 9: WARWICK ═════════════════════ -->
## 🎓 MSc Applied AI · University of Warwick {background-color="#0A1628"}

```{=html}
<div style="font-size:0.58em;color:#B0BEC5;margin-bottom:0.3em;">
  <strong style="color:#FFB300;">WMG (Warwick Manufacturing Group)</strong> ·
  Coventry, UK · เริ่ม 28 ก.ย. 2026 · 1 ปี ·
  <span style="color:#00BCD4;">QS Top 100 · Russell Group · 180 Credits</span>
</div>

<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.38em;font-size:0.6em;">

  <div class="highlight-box" style="padding:0.4em 0.6em;">
    <div style="color:#00BCD4;font-weight:700;">🔬 Fundamentals of AI R&D Management</div>
    <div style="color:#607080;font-size:0.82em;">WM9Q1-30 · <strong style="color:#FFB300;">30 Credits</strong></div>
    <div style="font-size:0.88em;color:#C0CDD8;line-height:1.4;">
      Research methods · AI challenges · Emerging trends · Consultancy skills
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="highlight-box" style="padding:0.4em 0.6em;">
    <div style="color:#00BCD4;font-weight:700;">💻 Programming for AI</div>
    <div style="color:#607080;font-size:0.82em;">WM9QF-15 · 15 Credits</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.88em;color:#C0CDD8;line-height:1.4;">
      Python · OOP · Algorithms · SQL · Raspberry Pi · Sensors
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="highlight-box" style="padding:0.4em 0.6em;">
    <div style="color:#00BCD4;font-weight:700;">📊 Fundamentals of AI & Data Mining</div>
    <div style="color:#607080;font-size:0.82em;">WM9QG-15 · 15 Credits</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.88em;color:#C0CDD8;line-height:1.4;">
      CRISP-DM · Supervised/Unsupervised/RL · GA · PSO · Big Data Cloud
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="highlight-box" style="padding:0.4em 0.6em;">
    <div style="color:#7C4DFF;font-weight:700;">🧠 AI & Deep Learning</div>
    <div style="color:#607080;font-size:0.82em;">WM9B7-15 · 15 Credits</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.88em;color:#C0CDD8;line-height:1.4;">
      ML algorithms · Neural Networks · Deep Learning · AI decision-making
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="highlight-box" style="padding:0.4em 0.6em;">
    <div style="color:#7C4DFF;font-weight:700;">📈 Applied Statistics for AI</div>
    <div style="color:#607080;font-size:0.82em;">WM9QE-15 · 15 Credits</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.88em;color:#C0CDD8;line-height:1.4;">
      Statistical methods · Data modelling · Analysis & AI optimization
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="highlight-box" style="padding:0.4em 0.6em;">
    <div style="color:#FFB300;font-weight:700;">⚖️ Ethical AI Implementation</div>
    <div style="color:#607080;font-size:0.82em;">WM9QD-15 · 15 Credits</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.88em;color:#C0CDD8;line-height:1.4;">
      AI Ethics · Law & Society · Responsible AI · Governance frameworks
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.38em;margin-top:0.35em;font-size:0.6em;">

  <div class="gold-box" style="padding:0.4em 0.6em;">
    <div style="color:#FFB300;font-weight:700;">🤖 AI for Industry</div>
    <div style="color:#607080;font-size:0.82em;">WM9QC-15 · 15 Credits</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.88em;color:#C0CDD8;line-height:1.4;">
      Robotics & Automation · Manufacturing / Healthcare / Logistics · Industrial AI
    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:rgba(0,188,212,0.08);border:2px solid #00BCD4;border-radius:8px;padding:0.4em 0.65em;">
    <div style="color:#00BCD4;font-weight:700;">🚀 MSc Dissertation Project</div>
    <div style="color:#607080;font-size:0.82em;">ES9U9-60 · <strong style="color:#FFB300;">60 Credits (33% of MSc)</strong></div>
    <div style="font-size:0.88em;color:#C0CDD8;line-height:1.4;">
      Major individual applied AI research project<br>
      <span style="color:#00E676;font-weight:600;">
        → Dissertation: ETDA Data Governance Policy Automation
      </span>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════ SLIDE 10: WARWICK RADAR ═════════════════════ -->
## ✅ คุณสมบัติการสมัคร · Warwick MSc Applied AI {background-color="#0A1628"}

:::: {.columns style="margin-top: 1em; align-items: center;"}

::: {.column width="55%"}
```{=html}
<!-- LEFT: Requirements -->
<div style="font-size:0.65em;font-weight:700;color:#00E676;margin-bottom:0.3em;">
  📋 Entry Requirements — ฉันผ่านทุกเกณฑ์
</div>
<div style="background:rgba(0,230,118,0.07); border:1.5px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.4); border-radius:8px;padding:0.5em 0.75em;font-size:0.6em;">
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:auto 1fr; gap:0.15em 0.4em;line-height:1.65;color:#C0CDD8;">
    <span style="color:#00E676;">✔</span>
    <span><strong style="color:#FFFFFF;">2:1 STEM Degree</strong> — BSc Health Data Science · KMUTT × CRA · <span style="color:#FFB300;">GPA 3.47 ✅</span></span>
    <span style="color:#00E676;">✔</span>
    <span><strong style="color:#FFFFFF;">STEM Subject</strong> — Health Data Science / Computer / Data Science · <span style="color:#FFB300;">ตรงสาขา ✅</span></span>
    <span style="color:#00E676;">✔</span>
    <span><strong style="color:#FFFFFF;">English IELTS Band A</strong> — Overall ≥ 6.5 · Each ≥ 6.0 · <span style="color:#FFB300;">ผ่านเกณฑ์ ✅</span></span>
    <span style="color:#00E676;">✔</span>
    <span><strong style="color:#FFFFFF;">Applied AI Background</strong> — 3+ ปีประสบการณ์จริง · <span style="color:#FFB300;">ตรง requirement ✅</span></span>
  </div>
</div>

<div style="margin-top:0.6em;font-size:0.56em;color:#B0BEC5;line-height:1.7;">
  <strong style="color:#FFB300;">📚 Modules @ Warwick:</strong><br>
  <span style="color:#00BCD4;">●</span> AI R&D Management (30cr) &nbsp; <span style="color:#7C4DFF;">●</span> Programming for AI (15cr)<br>
  <span style="color:#00BCD4;">●</span> AI & Data Mining (15cr) &nbsp; <span style="color:#7C4DFF;">●</span> AI & Deep Learning (15cr)<br>
  <span style="color:#FFB300;">●</span> Applied Statistics (15cr) &nbsp; <span style="color:#EF5350;">●</span> Ethical AI (15cr)<br>
  <span style="color:#00E676;">●</span> AI for Industry (15cr) &nbsp; <span style="color:#FF6D00;">●</span> Dissertation (60cr)
</div>
```
:::

::: {.column width="45%"}
```{=html}
<!-- RIGHT: Radar Chart Title -->
<div style="font-size:0.65em;font-weight:700;color:#FFB300;margin-bottom:0.2em;text-align:center;">
  🕸️ ความรู้ตามโมดูล Warwick — ก่อน vs หลังเรียน
</div>
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 5.5
#| fig-height: 4.8
#| out-width: "100%"

import plotly.graph_objects as go

modules = [
    "AI R&D<br>Management", "Programming<br>for AI", "AI &<br>Data Mining", 
    "AI & Deep<br>Learning", "Applied<br>Statistics", "Ethical AI<br>Implementation", 
    "AI for<br>Industry"
]
before = [10, 75, 80, 70, 70, 10, 10]
after  = [95, 90, 95, 90, 90, 80, 90]

mC = modules + [modules[0]]
bC = before + [before[0]]
aC = after + [after[0]]

fig = go.Figure()

fig.add_trace(go.Scatterpolar(
    r=bC, theta=mC, fill='toself', name='ก่อนเรียน',
    line=dict(color='rgba(21,101,192,0.8)', width=1.5, dash='dot'),
    fillcolor='rgba(21,101,192,0.15)', marker=dict(size=5, color='#1565C0')
))

fig.add_trace(go.Scatterpolar(
    r=aC, theta=mC, fill='toself', name='หลังเรียน Warwick',
    line=dict(color='#00BCD4', width=2.8),
    fillcolor='rgba(0,188,212,0.2)', marker=dict(size=8, color='#00BCD4', symbol='circle')
))

fig.update_layout(
    width=500, height=450,  
    paper_bgcolor='rgba(0,0,0,0)',
    plot_bgcolor='rgba(0,0,0,0)',
    polar=dict(
        bgcolor='rgba(13,33,55,0.7)',
        radialaxis=dict(
            visible=True, range=[0, 100], tickvals=[25, 50, 75, 100], 
            ticktext=['25%','50%','75%','100%'], 
            tickfont=dict(color='rgba(176,190,197,0.5)', size=10), 
            gridcolor='rgba(255,255,255,0.08)', linecolor='rgba(255,255,255,0.12)'
        ),
        angularaxis=dict(
            tickfont=dict(color='#00BCD4', size=11, family='Sarabun, sans-serif'), 
            gridcolor='rgba(255,255,255,0.09)', linecolor='rgba(255,255,255,0.12)'
        )
    ),
    margin=dict(l=50, r=50, t=20, b=50),
    showlegend=True,
    legend=dict(
        orientation='h', x=0.5, xanchor='center', y=-0.15, 
        font=dict(color='#B0BEC5', size=12), bgcolor='rgba(0,0,0,0)'
    )
)

fig.add_annotation(
    x=0.5, y=-0.28, xref='paper', yref='paper', 
    text='🎯 Dissertation = โปรเจค ETDA Policy Automation โดยตรง', 
    showarrow=False, font=dict(color='#FFB300', size=11), xanchor='center'
)

fig.show(config={"displayModeBar": False})
```
:::

::::

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════ SLIDE 13: CLOSING ════════════════════════════════ -->
## 🙏 สิ่งที่ฉันให้คำมั่นสัญญา {background-color="#0A1628"}

```{=html}
<div style="text-align:center;font-size:0.6em;color:#B0BEC5;margin-bottom:0.5em;">
  ประสบการณ์ที่สั่งสมมา → ยกระดับด้วยความรู้ระดับสากล → กลับสู่ ETDA
</div>

<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:1em;margin:0.5em 0;">
  <div class="metric-card">
    <span class="metric-number">MSc</span>
    <span class="metric-label">Applied AI<br>Warwick 2026–2027</span>
  </div>
  <div class="metric-card">
    <span class="metric-number">12</span>
    <span class="metric-label">เดือน Implementation<br>หลังสำเร็จการศึกษา</span>
  </div>
  <div class="metric-card">
    <span class="metric-number">∞</span>
    <span class="metric-label">คุณค่าที่ข้อมูลองค์กร<br>จะสร้างได้</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="highlight-box" style="font-size:0.72em;margin:0.6em 0;">
  <strong>สิ่งที่ ETDA จะได้กลับคืน:</strong><br>
  ✅ ระบบ Data Governance Automation ที่พร้อมใช้งานจริง<br>
  ✅ บุคลากรที่มีความเชี่ยวชาญระดับสากลด้าน Data Science & Governance<br>
  ✅ Use Case เป็น Reference Model สำหรับภาครัฐไทย<br>
  ✅ รากฐาน AI-Ready Data สำหรับอนาคตขององค์กร
</div>

<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1em;justify-content:center;margin-top:0.5em;">
  <img src="img/etda-logo.png" style="width:55px;opacity:0.85;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(0,188,212,0.4));">
  <div style="font-size:0.65em;text-align:left;color:#B0BEC5;">
    <strong style="color:#FFFFFF;">ธัญรดา โพธิ์พระรส</strong> · Data Scientist · ETDA<br>
    <span style="color:#00BCD4;">ทุน ก.พ. ประจำปีงบประมาณ 2569</span>
  </div>
</div>
```


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════ SLIDE 11: MOTIVATION ══════════════════════════ -->
## 💡 Motivation: Empowering the Future through AI {background-color="#0A1628"}

```{=html}
<!-- ปรับลด font-size หลัก และลด gap ระหว่างกล่องเพื่อป้องกันการล้นจอ -->
<div class="two-col" style="font-family:'Inter', 'Sarabun', sans-serif; height: 100%; font-size: 0.58em; align-items: start;">
  
  <!-- ── LEFT: Personal & Professional Motivation ── -->
  <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:flex-start;">
    <div style="font-size: 0.9em; font-weight: 800; color: #00BCD4; margin-bottom: 0.6em; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px;">
      🚀 Why Pursue a Master's Degree?
    </div>

    <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5em;">
      
      <!-- Point 1 -->
      <div style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); border: 1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.3); border-radius: 8px; padding: 0.5em 0.8em; border-left: 3px solid #00BCD4;">
        <strong style="color: #FFF; font-size: 1.05em;">1. Deep-rooted Passion for Data & AI</strong><br>
        <span style="color: #C0CDD8; line-height: 1.4; display: inline-block; margin-top: 0.2em; font-size: 0.85em;">
          หลงใหลในการวิเคราะห์ข้อมูล และเชื่อมั่นว่า AI คือกุญแจสำคัญที่จะพลิกโฉมและเพิ่มขีดความสามารถขององค์กร
        </span>
      </div>

      <!-- Point 2 -->
      <div style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); border: 1px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.3); border-radius: 8px; padding: 0.5em 0.8em; border-left: 3px solid #00E676;">
        <strong style="color: #FFF; font-size: 1.05em;">2. Driving Impact through Data</strong><br>
        <span style="color: #C0CDD8; line-height: 1.4; display: inline-block; margin-top: 0.2em; font-size: 0.85em;">
          มีความสุขเสมอเมื่อได้เห็น "ข้อมูลดิบ" ถูกแปลงเป็น "คุณค่า (Value)" ที่นำไปใช้แก้ปัญหาและสร้างประโยชน์ได้จริง
        </span>
      </div>

      <!-- Point 3 -->
      <div style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); border: 1px solid rgba(124,77,255,0.3); border-radius: 8px; padding: 0.5em 0.8em; border-left: 3px solid #7C4DFF;">
        <strong style="color: #FFF; font-size: 1.05em;">3. Global Communication & Standards</strong><br>
        <span style="color: #C0CDD8; line-height: 1.4; display: inline-block; margin-top: 0.2em; font-size: 0.85em;">
          ยกระดับทักษะภาษาอังกฤษสู่สากล เพื่อศึกษา Best Practices จากทั่วโลกและนำเทคโนโลยีใหม่ๆ กลับมาพัฒนาประเทศ
        </span>
      </div>

      <!-- Point 4 -->
      <div style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); border: 1px solid rgba(239,83,80,0.3); border-radius: 8px; padding: 0.5em 0.8em; border-left: 3px solid #EF5350;">
        <strong style="color: #FFF; font-size: 1.05em;">4. Bridging Tech & Public Policy</strong><br>
        <span style="color: #C0CDD8; line-height: 1.4; display: inline-block; margin-top: 0.2em; font-size: 0.85em;">
          อุดช่องว่างระหว่างคนทำ Tech กับคนทำ Policy เพื่อเปลี่ยน "นโยบายบนกระดาษ" ให้เป็น "ระบบ Automation" ที่จับต้องได้
        </span>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── RIGHT: Why Warwick ── -->
  <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:flex-start;">
    <div class="gold-box" style="padding: 0.6em 1em; border-radius: 8px; margin: 0;">
      <div style="font-size: 1.05em; color: #FFB300; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 0.1em;">🏛️ Why University of Warwick?</div>
      <div style="color: #FFF; font-size: 0.85em;">MSc Applied Artificial Intelligence (WMG)</div>
    </div>
    
    <div style="margin-top: 0.6em; background: rgba(13,33,55,0.6); border-radius: 12px; padding: 1.2em; border: 1px solid rgba(255,179,0,0.2);">
      
      <div class="timeline-item" style="margin-bottom: 0.8em; padding-top: 0;">
        <strong style="font-size: 1.05em; color: #FFF;">World-Class Academic Excellence</strong><br>
        <span style="font-size: 0.85em; color: #B0BEC5; display: inline-block; margin-top: 0.2em; line-height: 1.4;">
          อยู่ใน <strong>QS Top 100</strong> และ <strong>Russell Group</strong> ผ่านหลักเกณฑ์การรับทุนของ ก.พ. อย่างสมบูรณ์แบบ
        </span>
      </div>
      
      <div class="timeline-item" style="margin-bottom: 0.8em;">
        <strong style="font-size: 1.05em; color: #FFF;">Industry-Focused & Applied Curriculum</strong><br>
        <span style="font-size: 0.85em; color: #B0BEC5; display: inline-block; margin-top: 0.2em; line-height: 1.4;">
          หลักสูตรของ <strong>WMG (Warwick Manufacturing Group)</strong> ไม่เน้นแค่ทฤษฎี แต่เน้นการนำ AI ไปแก้ปัญหาในบริบทอุตสาหกรรมจริง
        </span>
      </div>
      
      <div class="timeline-item">
        <strong style="font-size: 1.05em; color: #FFF;">Strategic Dissertation (ETDA Impact)</strong><br>
        <span style="font-size: 0.85em; color: #B0BEC5; display: inline-block; margin-top: 0.2em; line-height: 1.4;">
          วิชาวิจัย (60 Credits) เปิดโอกาสให้นำปัญหาขององค์กรไปทำ Thesis ทำให้สร้าง <strong>Governance Automation</strong> กลับมาใช้ที่ ETDA ได้ทันที
        </span>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```



<!-- ═══════════════════════════════ APPENDIX: UNIVERSITY APPLICATIONS ════════════════════════════════ -->
## 📋 Appendix: University Applications Status {background-color="#0A1628"}

```{=html}
<div style="font-family:'Inter','Sarabun',sans-serif;font-size:0.56em;">

  <div style="font-size:0.85em;color:#B0BEC5;margin-bottom:0.8em;text-align:center;">
    กลุ่มสาขาวิชาที่ 1 · คอมพิวเตอร์ / เทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศ / ปัญญาประดิษฐ์ (AI) / Data Analytics
    <span style="color:#78909C;margin-left:0.5em;">·</span>
    <span style="color:#00BCD4;margin-left:0.5em;">Times Higher Education (THE) UK University Rankings 2026</span>
  </div>

  <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.95em;">
    
    <!-- Header -->
    <tr style="background:rgba(0,188,212,0.15);border-bottom:2px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.4);">
      <th style="padding:0.55em 0.6em;text-align:center;color:#00BCD4;width:4%;">#</th>
      <th style="padding:0.55em 0.6em;text-align:left;color:#00BCD4;width:21%;">มหาวิทยาลัย</th>
      <th style="padding:0.55em 0.4em;text-align:center;color:#00BCD4;width:8%;">THE<br>UK 2026</th>
      <th style="padding:0.55em 0.4em;text-align:center;color:#00BCD4;width:8%;">THE<br>World 2026</th>
      <th style="padding:0.55em 0.6em;text-align:left;color:#00BCD4;width:24%;">ชื่อสาขา</th>
      <th style="padding:0.55em 0.6em;text-align:center;color:#00BCD4;width:16%;">สถานะ</th>
      <th style="padding:0.55em 0.6em;text-align:left;color:#00BCD4;">หมายเหตุ</th>
    </tr>

    <!-- Row 1: Edinburgh #5 UK / #29 World -->
    <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.01);">
      <td style="padding:0.6em;text-align:center;color:#78909C;">1</td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;">
        <div style="font-weight:700;color:#FFFFFF;">University of Edinburgh</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.85em;color:#78909C;">Edinburgh, Scotland</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;text-align:center;">
        <div style="background:rgba(0,230,118,0.2);color:#00E676;border:1px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.6);padding:0.2em 0.5em;border-radius:4px;font-weight:800;display:inline-block;">#5</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;text-align:center;">
        <div style="color:#78909C;font-size:0.9em;">#29</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;color:#E0E0E0;">MSc Data Science</td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;text-align:center;">
        <span style="background:rgba(30,136,229,0.15);color:#1E88E5;border:1px solid rgba(30,136,229,0.4);padding:0.25em 0.5em;border-radius:20px;font-weight:700;font-size:0.85em;">
          📋 Conditional Offer
        </span>
      </td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;color:#B0BEC5;font-size:0.9em;">—</td>
    </tr>

    <!-- Row 2: Bristol #9 UK / #80 World -->
    <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.01);">
      <td style="padding:0.6em;text-align:center;color:#78909C;">2</td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;">
        <div style="font-weight:700;color:#FFFFFF;">University of Bristol</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.85em;color:#78909C;">Bristol</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;text-align:center;">
        <div style="background:rgba(0,230,118,0.15);color:#00E676;border:1px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.5);padding:0.2em 0.5em;border-radius:4px;font-weight:800;display:inline-block;">#9</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;text-align:center;">
        <div style="color:#78909C;font-size:0.9em;">=80</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;color:#E0E0E0;">MSc Data Science</td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;text-align:center;">
        <span style="background:rgba(30,136,229,0.15);color:#1E88E5;border:1px solid rgba(30,136,229,0.4);padding:0.25em 0.5em;border-radius:20px;font-weight:700;font-size:0.85em;">
          📋 Conditional Offer
        </span>
      </td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;color:#B0BEC5;font-size:0.9em;">—</td>
    </tr>

    <!-- Row 3: Glasgow #10 UK / #84 World -->
    <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);background:rgba(0,230,118,0.02);">
      <td style="padding:0.6em;text-align:center;color:#78909C;">3</td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;">
        <div style="font-weight:700;color:#FFFFFF;">University of Glasgow</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.85em;color:#78909C;">Glasgow, Scotland</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;text-align:center;">
        <div style="background:rgba(0,188,212,0.2);color:#00BCD4;border:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.6);padding:0.2em 0.5em;border-radius:4px;font-weight:800;display:inline-block;">#10</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;text-align:center;">
        <div style="color:#78909C;font-size:0.9em;">#84</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;color:#E0E0E0;">
        MSc Data Analytics<br>
        <span style="font-size:0.85em;color:#78909C;">(Economic and Finance)</span>
      </td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;text-align:center;">
        <span style="background:rgba(0,230,118,0.15);color:#00E676;border:1px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.4);padding:0.25em 0.5em;border-radius:20px;font-weight:700;font-size:0.85em;">
          ✅ Unconditional
        </span>
      </td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;font-size:0.9em;">
        <span style="background:rgba(124,77,255,0.15);color:#7C4DFF;border:1px solid rgba(124,77,255,0.4);padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:4px;white-space:nowrap;">Deposit Exemption</span>
      </td>
    </tr>

    <!-- Row 4: Leeds #13 UK / #118 World -->
    <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);background:rgba(0,230,118,0.02);">
      <td style="padding:0.6em;text-align:center;color:#78909C;">4</td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;">
        <div style="font-weight:700;color:#FFFFFF;">University of Leeds</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.85em;color:#78909C;">Leeds</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;text-align:center;">
        <div style="background:rgba(0,188,212,0.15);color:#00BCD4;border:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.5);padding:0.2em 0.5em;border-radius:4px;font-weight:800;display:inline-block;">#13</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;text-align:center;">
        <div style="color:#78909C;font-size:0.9em;">#118</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;color:#E0E0E0;">MSc Data Science and Analytics</td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;text-align:center;">
        <span style="background:rgba(0,230,118,0.15);color:#00E676;border:1px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.4);padding:0.25em 0.5em;border-radius:20px;font-weight:700;font-size:0.85em;">
          ✅ Unconditional
        </span>
      </td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;color:#B0BEC5;font-size:0.9em;">—</td>
    </tr>

    <!-- Row 5: Warwick #14 UK / #122 World (First Choice) -->
    <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);background:rgba(255,179,0,0.05);outline:1px solid rgba(255,179,0,0.2);">
      <td style="padding:0.6em;text-align:center;color:#78909C;">5</td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;">
        <div style="font-weight:700;color:#FFB300;">University of Warwick ⭐</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.85em;color:#78909C;">WMG · Coventry</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;text-align:center;">
        <div style="background:rgba(255,179,0,0.2);color:#FFB300;border:1px solid rgba(255,179,0,0.6);padding:0.2em 0.5em;border-radius:4px;font-weight:800;display:inline-block;">#14</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;text-align:center;">
        <div style="color:#78909C;font-size:0.9em;">=122</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;color:#E0E0E0;">MSc Applied Artificial Intelligence</td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;text-align:center;">
        <span style="background:rgba(255,167,38,0.15);color:#FFA726;border:1px solid rgba(255,167,38,0.4);padding:0.25em 0.5em;border-radius:20px;font-weight:700;font-size:0.85em;">
          🕐 ยังไม่ได้สมัคร
        </span>
      </td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;color:#FFB300;font-size:0.9em;font-weight:700;">
        First Choice (ทุน ก.พ.)
      </td>
    </tr>

    <!-- Row 6: Exeter #22 UK / #170 World -->
    <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);background:rgba(0,230,118,0.02);">
      <td style="padding:0.6em;text-align:center;color:#78909C;">6</td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;">
        <div style="font-weight:700;color:#FFFFFF;">University of Exeter</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.85em;color:#78909C;">Exeter</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;text-align:center;">
        <div style="background:rgba(0,188,212,0.1);color:#00BCD4;border:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.4);padding:0.2em 0.5em;border-radius:4px;font-weight:800;display:inline-block;">#22</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;text-align:center;">
        <div style="color:#78909C;font-size:0.9em;">=170</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;color:#E0E0E0;">MSc Advanced Data Science</td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;text-align:center;">
        <span style="background:rgba(0,230,118,0.15);color:#00E676;border:1px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.4);padding:0.25em 0.5em;border-radius:20px;font-weight:700;font-size:0.85em;">
          ✅ Unconditional
        </span>
      </td>
      <td style="padding:0.6em;font-size:0.9em;">
        <span style="background:rgba(0,230,118,0.15);color:#00E676;border:1px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.4);padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:4px;white-space:nowrap;">Extend deposit → July</span>
      </td>
    </tr>

    <!-- Empty Row -->
    <tr style="opacity:0.3;">
      <td style="padding:0.6em;text-align:center;color:#607080;">7</td>
      <td colspan="6" style="padding:0.6em;color:#607080;font-style:italic;font-size:0.9em;">
        — (สำหรับเพิ่มข้อมูลในภายหลัง)
      </td>
    </tr>

  </table>

  <!-- Summary + Source -->
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.8em;margin-top:1em;">
    <div style="background:rgba(0,230,118,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.3);border-radius:8px;padding:0.5em 0.8em;text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-size:1.8em;font-weight:800;color:#00E676;">3</div>
      <div style="color:#B0BEC5;font-size:0.82em;">Unconditional Offers</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:rgba(30,136,229,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(30,136,229,0.3);border-radius:8px;padding:0.5em 0.8em;text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-size:1.8em;font-weight:800;color:#1E88E5;">2</div>
      <div style="color:#B0BEC5;font-size:0.82em;">Conditional Offers</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:rgba(255,167,38,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(255,167,38,0.3);border-radius:8px;padding:0.5em 0.8em;text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-size:1.8em;font-weight:800;color:#FFA726;">1</div>
      <div style="color:#B0BEC5;font-size:0.82em;">ยังไม่ได้สมัคร</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:rgba(0,188,212,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.3);border-radius:8px;padding:0.5em 0.8em;text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-size:1.8em;font-weight:800;color:#00BCD4;">#5–22</div>
      <div style="color:#B0BEC5;font-size:0.82em;">THE UK 2026 Range</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Legend + Source -->
  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-top:0.8em;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.5em;">
    <div style="display:flex;gap:1em;flex-wrap:wrap;font-size:0.82em;">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;">
        <span style="background:rgba(0,230,118,0.15);color:#00E676;border:1px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.4);padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:20px;font-weight:700;">✅ Unconditional</span>
        <span style="color:#78909C;">รับโดยไม่มีเงื่อนไข</span>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;">
        <span style="background:rgba(30,136,229,0.15);color:#1E88E5;border:1px solid rgba(30,136,229,0.4);padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:20px;font-weight:700;">📋 Conditional</span>
        <span style="color:#78909C;">มีเงื่อนไข</span>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;">
        <span style="background:rgba(124,77,255,0.15);color:#7C4DFF;border:1px solid rgba(124,77,255,0.4);padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:4px;font-weight:700;">Deposit Exemption</span>
        <span style="color:#78909C;">ยกเว้นค่ามัดจำ</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:0.78em;color:#607080;text-align:right;">
      📊 Source: timeshighereducation.com · THE UK Rankings 2026
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════ SLIDE: ONE PAGE PROPOSAL ════════════════════════════════ -->
## 📋 ข้อเสนอโครงการ {background-color="#0A1628"}

```{=html}
<div style="font-family:'Inter','Sarabun',sans-serif;font-size:0.56em;height:100%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.5em;">

  <!-- Header Banner -->
  <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,188,212,0.15),rgba(124,77,255,0.1));border:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.3);border-radius:10px;padding:0.6em 1em;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;">
    <div>
      <div style="color:#00BCD4;font-weight:800;font-size:1.15em;">โครงการพัฒนาระบบธรรมาภิบาลข้อมูลองค์กรด้วยปัญญาประดิษฐ์</div>
      <div style="color:#B0BEC5;font-size:0.88em;margin-top:0.15em;">ETDA Data Governance Policy Automation · ทุน ก.พ. 2569 · กลุ่มสาขา 1 Computer/AI/Data Analytics</div>
    </div>
    <div style="text-align:right;color:#78909C;font-size:0.85em;white-space:nowrap;">
      <div style="color:#FFB300;font-weight:700;">นางสาวธัญรดา โพธิ์พระรส</div>
      <div>Data Scientist · ETDA</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Main Grid: 3 columns -->
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.5em;flex:1;">

    <!-- Col 1 -->
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.5em;">

      <!-- ที่มา -->
      <div style="background:rgba(30,136,229,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(30,136,229,0.3);border-radius:8px;padding:0.6em 0.8em;">
        <div style="color:#1E88E5;font-weight:800;font-size:0.95em;margin-bottom:0.35em;">📌 1. ที่มาของโครงการ</div>
        <div style="color:#C0CDD8;line-height:1.55;font-size:0.88em;">
          ETDA มีนโยบาย Data Governance ที่วางไว้แล้ว แต่ยังขาด <strong>กลไก Automation</strong> ที่จะแปลงนโยบายสู่การปฏิบัติจริงในวงกว้าง การบังคับใช้แบบ Manual มีข้อจำกัดด้านความสม่ำเสมอและภาระงาน<br><br>
          โครงการนี้จะสร้าง <strong>"Policy-to-Automation Bridge"</strong> โดยอาศัย AI + Microsoft 365 ที่มีอยู่แล้ว สอดคล้องกับกลยุทธ์ที่ 5 ของแผนยุทธศาสตร์ ETDA 2566–2570 ด้านการเป็นองค์กร <strong>Data Driven</strong>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- วัตถุประสงค์ -->
      <div style="background:rgba(0,188,212,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.3);border-radius:8px;padding:0.6em 0.8em;flex:1;">
        <div style="color:#00BCD4;font-weight:800;font-size:0.95em;margin-bottom:0.35em;">🎯 2. วัตถุประสงค์</div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.25em;font-size:0.85em;color:#C0CDD8;line-height:1.5;">
          <div>▪ พัฒนา <strong>Automation</strong> แปลงนโยบาย Data Governance ให้ทำงานได้จริง</div>
          <div>▪ ยกระดับ <strong>Policy Enforcement</strong> ให้สม่ำเสมอ ลด Manual Process</div>
          <div>▪ พัฒนา <strong>AI-Powered Auto-Classification</strong> จำแนกชั้นความลับ + ประเภทเอกสาร</div>
          <div>▪ สร้าง <strong>Data Catalog</strong> กลางที่แสดง Policy Compliance Status แบบ Real-time</div>
          <div>▪ วางรากฐานสู่ <strong>Data-Driven Organization</strong> ในระยะยาว</div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>

    <!-- Col 2 -->
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.5em;">

      <!-- Output + Outcome -->
      <div style="background:rgba(124,77,255,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(124,77,255,0.3);border-radius:8px;padding:0.6em 0.8em;">
        <div style="color:#7C4DFF;font-weight:800;font-size:0.95em;margin-bottom:0.35em;">📦 4. Output & Outcome</div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.3em;font-size:0.82em;">
          <div style="background:rgba(124,77,255,0.08);border-radius:5px;padding:0.3em 0.6em;">
            <strong style="color:#7C4DFF;">Output 1</strong> <span style="color:#C0CDD8;">Current State Assessment Dashboard</span>
          </div>
          <div style="background:rgba(124,77,255,0.08);border-radius:5px;padding:0.3em 0.6em;">
            <strong style="color:#7C4DFF;">Output 2</strong> <span style="color:#C0CDD8;">AI Auto-Classification & Labelling System</span>
          </div>
          <div style="background:rgba(124,77,255,0.08);border-radius:5px;padding:0.3em 0.6em;">
            <strong style="color:#7C4DFF;">Output 3</strong> <span style="color:#C0CDD8;">Automated Lifecycle Workflow</span>
          </div>
          <div style="background:rgba(124,77,255,0.08);border-radius:5px;padding:0.3em 0.6em;">
            <strong style="color:#7C4DFF;">Output 4</strong> <span style="color:#C0CDD8;">Data Catalog / Governance Dashboard</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="margin-top:0.4em;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.25em;font-size:0.82em;color:#C0CDD8;">
          <div style="color:#00E676;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.1em;">Outcome:</div>
          <div>✅ Improved Data Governance Practice</div>
          <div>✅ Better Data Quality & Usability</div>
          <div>✅ Future AI Readiness</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ประโยชน์ -->
      <div style="background:rgba(0,230,118,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.3);border-radius:8px;padding:0.6em 0.8em;flex:1;">
        <div style="color:#00E676;font-weight:800;font-size:0.95em;margin-bottom:0.35em;">💡 3. ประโยชน์ที่คาดว่าจะได้รับ</div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.25em;font-size:0.85em;color:#C0CDD8;line-height:1.5;">
          <div>▪ นโยบาย Data Governance ถูกบังคับใช้ได้จริงโดย Automation</div>
          <div>▪ ข้อมูลมีคุณภาพ ลดซ้ำซ้อน มี Label ที่ชัดเจน</div>
          <div>▪ องค์กรมี Data Catalog ค้นหาได้ง่าย รู้ผู้รับผิดชอบ</div>
          <div>▪ รองรับ AI-enhanced capabilities ในอนาคต</div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>

    <!-- Col 3 -->
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.5em;">

      <!-- Impact -->
      <div style="background:rgba(255,167,38,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(255,167,38,0.3);border-radius:8px;padding:0.6em 0.8em;">
        <div style="color:#FFA726;font-weight:800;font-size:0.95em;margin-bottom:0.35em;">⚡ 5. ผลกระทบ</div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.25em;font-size:0.85em;color:#C0CDD8;line-height:1.5;">
          <div><strong style="color:#FFA726;">Internal:</strong> กลไก Automation เสริมให้นโยบายที่มีอยู่ถูกบังคับใช้จริงในวงกว้าง ไม่ต้องพึ่ง Manual</div>
          <div><strong style="color:#FFA726;">Operational:</strong> บุคลากรค้นหา เข้าถึง และใช้ข้อมูลได้ง่ายขึ้น ลดเวลาค้นหาและตรวจสอบความถูกต้อง</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Stakeholders -->
      <div style="background:rgba(239,83,80,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(239,83,80,0.3);border-radius:8px;padding:0.6em 0.8em;">
        <div style="color:#EF5350;font-weight:800;font-size:0.95em;margin-bottom:0.35em;">👥 6. ผู้ได้รับประโยชน์</div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.3em;font-size:0.82em;">
          <div style="background:rgba(239,83,80,0.08);border-radius:5px;padding:0.3em 0.6em;">
            <strong style="color:#EF5350;">ทีม Data Governance</strong><br>
            <span style="color:#C0CDD8;">Automation Tools + Compliance Dashboard</span>
          </div>
          <div style="background:rgba(239,83,80,0.08);border-radius:5px;padding:0.3em 0.6em;">
            <strong style="color:#EF5350;">หน่วยงานภายใน</strong><br>
            <span style="color:#C0CDD8;">ข้อมูลเป็นระเบียบ ค้นหาได้ง่าย ลดซ้ำซ้อน</span>
          </div>
          <div style="background:rgba(239,83,80,0.08);border-radius:5px;padding:0.3em 0.6em;">
            <strong style="color:#EF5350;">Data Owner / Data Steward</strong><br>
            <span style="color:#C0CDD8;">เครื่องมือ Data Lifecycle + Quality Tracking</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Strategic Alignment -->
      <div style="background:rgba(255,179,0,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(255,179,0,0.4);border-radius:8px;padding:0.6em 0.8em;flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;">
        <div style="color:#FFB300;font-weight:800;font-size:0.9em;margin-bottom:0.4em;">🏛️ สอดคล้องยุทธศาสตร์</div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.2em;font-size:0.82em;color:#C0CDD8;line-height:1.5;">
          <div>✅ พ.ร.บ. บริหารงานรัฐผ่านระบบดิจิทัล 2562</div>
          <div>✅ ยุทธศาสตร์ ETDA กลยุทธ์ที่ 5 (2566–2570)</div>
          <div>✅ แผนรัฐบาลดิจิทัล Data Governance</div>
          <div>✅ Zero New Budget (ใช้ M365 + Python เดิม)</div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════ SLIDE: POC RESULTS ════════════════════════════════ -->
## 📊 หลักฐานจาก PoC — สถานะข้อมูลปัจจุบัน {background-color="#0A1628"}

```{=html}
<div style="font-family:'Inter','Sarabun',sans-serif;font-size:0.58em;height:100%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.5em;">

  <!-- Methodology Banner -->
  <div style="background:rgba(0,188,212,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.2);border-radius:8px;padding:0.4em 1em;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;">
    <div style="color:#B0BEC5;font-size:0.9em;">
      <strong style="color:#00BCD4;">วิธีการ:</strong> Microsoft Graph API · Metadata Analysis · Privacy-by-Design (ไม่เข้าถึง Content)
    </div>
    <div style="color:#78909C;font-size:0.88em;">OneDrive for Business · 10 Accounts · 2016–2025</div>
  </div>

  <!-- KPI Cards -->
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.5em;">
    <div style="background:rgba(0,188,212,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.4);border-radius:8px;padding:0.6em;text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-size:2em;font-weight:800;color:#00BCD4;line-height:1;">950K+</div>
      <div style="color:#FFF;font-weight:600;font-size:0.9em;margin-top:0.2em;">ไฟล์ทั้งหมด</div>
      <div style="color:#78909C;font-size:0.82em;">4.74 TB</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:rgba(239,83,80,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(239,83,80,0.4);border-radius:8px;padding:0.6em;text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-size:2em;font-weight:800;color:#EF5350;line-height:1;">77%</div>
      <div style="color:#FFF;font-weight:600;font-size:0.9em;margin-top:0.2em;">ไม่ได้ใช้ > 2 ปี</div>
      <div style="color:#78909C;font-size:0.82em;">~736K ไฟล์ · 3.01 TB</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:rgba(255,167,38,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,167,38,0.4);border-radius:8px;padding:0.6em;text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-size:2em;font-weight:800;color:#FFA726;line-height:1;">436K</div>
      <div style="color:#FFF;font-weight:600;font-size:0.9em;margin-top:0.2em;">ไฟล์ซ้ำซ้อน</div>
      <div style="color:#78909C;font-size:0.82em;">1.58 TB</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:rgba(124,77,255,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(124,77,255,0.4);border-radius:8px;padding:0.6em;text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-size:2em;font-weight:800;color:#7C4DFF;line-height:1;">~8.5 TB</div>
      <div style="color:#FFF;font-weight:600;font-size:0.9em;margin-top:0.2em;">คาดการณ์ปี 2030</div>
      <div style="color:#78909C;font-size:0.82em;">หากไม่มี Governance</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Main Content -->
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.8fr 1fr;gap:0.5em;flex:1;">

    <!-- Left: Tree + Chart area -->
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.5em;">

      <!-- File Age Analysis -->
      <div style="background:#0d2137;border:1px solid #1a2a40;border-radius:8px;padding:0.7em 0.9em;flex:1;">
        <div style="color:#FFB300;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.5em;font-size:0.92em;">📁 Data Lineage — โครงสร้างการจัดเก็บข้อมูล onedrive10@etda.or.th</div>
        <div style="border:1.5px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.35);border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;height:200px;background:#0d2137;">
          <div style="background:rgba(10,22,40,0.97);padding:0.3em 0.7em;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.2);font-size:0.78em;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;">
            <span style="color:#00BCD4;">🌳 OneDrive DAC — Metadata View</span>
            <span style="color:#78909C;">Privacy-by-Design · Content NOT accessed</span>
          </div>
          <iframe src="onedrive10_at_etda_or_th_tree.html" style="width:100%;height:170px;border:none;background:#fff;"></iframe>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>

    <!-- Right: Findings + Opportunity -->
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.4em;">

      <div style="color:#FFB300;font-weight:800;font-size:0.92em;">🔍 สิ่งที่พบจาก PoC</div>

      <div style="background:rgba(239,83,80,0.08);border-left:3px solid #EF5350;border-radius:0 6px 6px 0;padding:0.4em 0.7em;line-height:1.5;color:#C0CDD8;font-size:0.85em;">
        <strong style="color:#EF5350;">⚠️ ขาด Classification</strong><br>
        ข้อมูลถูกจัดเก็บปะปนกันโดยไม่มีการกำหนดชั้นความลับ พบไฟล์ .ppk และ Credential ปะปนกับเอกสารทั่วไป
      </div>

      <div style="background:rgba(255,167,38,0.08);border-left:3px solid #FFA726;border-radius:0 6px 6px 0;padding:0.4em 0.7em;line-height:1.5;color:#C0CDD8;font-size:0.85em;">
        <strong style="color:#FFA726;">⚠️ ขาด Lifecycle Management</strong><br>
        77% ของไฟล์ไม่ถูกเรียกใช้ > 2 ปี สะสมเป็นไฟล์ขยะ ไม่มีกระบวนการ Archive หรือ Review
      </div>

      <div style="background:rgba(124,77,255,0.08);border-left:3px solid #7C4DFF;border-radius:0 6px 6px 0;padding:0.4em 0.7em;line-height:1.5;color:#C0CDD8;font-size:0.85em;">
        <strong style="color:#7C4DFF;">⚠️ ขาด Data Catalog</strong><br>
        ไม่มีระบบค้นหากลาง ไม่ทราบผู้รับผิดชอบข้อมูล ทีมงานต้องค้นหาไฟล์ด้วยตนเอง
      </div>

      <div style="background:rgba(0,230,118,0.08);border-left:3px solid #00E676;border-radius:0 6px 6px 0;padding:0.4em 0.7em;line-height:1.5;color:#C0CDD8;font-size:0.85em;">
        <strong style="color:#00E676;">✅ โอกาส</strong><br>
        หากมี Automation + AI Classification จะสามารถจัดระเบียบข้อมูล 950K+ ไฟล์ได้อย่างเป็นระบบ
      </div>

      <div style="margin-top:auto;background:rgba(0,188,212,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.25);border-radius:6px;padding:0.4em 0.7em;font-size:0.82em;color:#B0BEC5;">
        🔒 <strong style="color:#00BCD4;">Privacy-by-Design:</strong> ดึงเฉพาะ Metadata · ไม่เข้าถึง Content ของไฟล์
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════ SLIDE: IMPLEMENTATION PLAN ════════════════════════════════ -->
## 📅 แผนการดำเนินงาน (Implementation Plan) {background-color="#0A1628"}

```{=html}
<style>
.gtt { width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;table-layout:fixed; }
.gtt-hrow th {
  padding:0.6em 0; font-size:0.62em; color:#78909C; font-weight:normal;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  border-left:1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.05); text-align:center;
}
.gtt-hrow th:first-child { border-left:none; text-align:left; padding-left:1.2em; }
.gtt-row { border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04); }
.gtt-row:last-child { border-bottom:none; }
.gtt-lbl { width:26%; padding:0.75em 1em; border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); vertical-align:middle; }
.gtt-chart { width:74%; position:relative; }
.gtt-grid { position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;display:flex;pointer-events:none;z-index:0; }
.gtt-grid div { flex:1; border-left:1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.04); }
.gtt-bars { position:relative;height:100%;width:100%;padding:0.85em 0;z-index:10; }
.gbar { position:absolute;height:30px;border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.6em;font-weight:700;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);white-space:nowrap;box-shadow:0 3px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); }
.gb1 { background:linear-gradient(90deg,#1565C0,#1E88E5); color:#FFF; }
.gb2 { background:linear-gradient(90deg,#F57C00,#FFA726); color:#0A1628; }
.gb3 { background:linear-gradient(90deg,#5E35B1,#7C4DFF); color:#FFF; }
.gb4 { background:linear-gradient(90deg,#00C853,#00E676); color:#0A1628; }
</style>

<div style="font-family:'Inter','Sarabun',sans-serif;display:flex;flex-direction:column;height:88%;">

  <div style="color:#B0BEC5;text-align:center;margin-bottom:0.8em;font-size:0.62em;">
    <strong style="color:#FFB300;">Roadmap 10 เดือน</strong>
    <span style="color:#78909C;margin-left:0.8em;">· หลังสำเร็จการศึกษา MSc Applied AI · University of Warwick</span>
  </div>

  <div style="background:rgba(13,33,55,0.5);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;flex:1;">
    <table class="gtt">

      <!-- Header -->
      <tr class="gtt-hrow">
        <th style="width:26%;">Phase & Activities</th>
        <th>M1</th><th>M2</th><th>M3</th><th>M4</th><th>M5</th><th>M6</th>
        <th>M7</th><th>M8</th><th>M9</th><th>M10</th>
      </tr>

      <!-- Phase 1 -->
      <tr class="gtt-row">
        <td class="gtt-lbl">
          <div style="color:#1E88E5;font-weight:700;font-size:0.65em;">Phase 1 (เดือน 1–2)</div>
          <div style="color:#FFF;font-weight:700;font-size:0.62em;margin-top:0.15em;">Discovery & Profiling</div>
          <div style="color:#78909C;font-size:0.52em;margin-top:0.25em;line-height:1.4;">สำรวจแหล่งเก็บข้อมูล · วิเคราะห์โครงสร้าง · สร้าง Baseline Dashboard</div>
          <div style="margin-top:0.3em;font-size:0.5em;color:#607080;">Metadata Analysis · API · Dashboard</div>
        </td>
        <td colspan="10" class="gtt-chart">
          <div class="gtt-grid"><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div></div>
          <div class="gtt-bars"><div class="gbar gb1" style="left:0.5%;width:19%;">Metadata & API Integration</div></div>
        </td>
      </tr>

      <!-- Phase 2 -->
      <tr class="gtt-row">
        <td class="gtt-lbl">
          <div style="color:#FFA726;font-weight:700;font-size:0.65em;">Phase 2 (เดือน 3–4)</div>
          <div style="color:#FFF;font-weight:700;font-size:0.62em;margin-top:0.15em;">Data Cleanup</div>
          <div style="color:#78909C;font-size:0.52em;margin-top:0.25em;line-height:1.4;">ลบไฟล์ซ้ำด้วย SHA-256 Hash · Archive ไฟล์เก่าตามเกณฑ์นโยบาย</div>
          <div style="margin-top:0.3em;font-size:0.5em;color:#607080;">Data Engineering (ETL)</div>
        </td>
        <td colspan="10" class="gtt-chart">
          <div class="gtt-grid"><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div></div>
          <div class="gtt-bars"><div class="gbar gb2" style="left:20.5%;width:19%;">ETL & Deduplication</div></div>
        </td>
      </tr>

      <!-- Phase 3 -->
      <tr class="gtt-row">
        <td class="gtt-lbl">
          <div style="color:#7C4DFF;font-weight:700;font-size:0.65em;">Phase 3 (เดือน 5–10)</div>
          <div style="color:#FFF;font-weight:700;font-size:0.62em;margin-top:0.15em;">AI Classification & Labelling</div>
          <div style="color:#78909C;font-size:0.52em;margin-top:0.25em;line-height:1.4;">จำแนกชั้นความลับ (Public/Internal/Confidential) · ติดป้ายกำกับอัตโนมัติ · สกัดข้อความ</div>
          <div style="margin-top:0.3em;font-size:0.5em;color:#607080;">NLP · Classification Framework · AI-enhanced</div>
        </td>
        <td colspan="10" class="gtt-chart">
          <div class="gtt-grid"><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div></div>
          <div class="gtt-bars"><div class="gbar gb3" style="left:40.5%;width:59%;">NLP Model · Auto-Labelling · Metadata Tagging</div></div>
        </td>
      </tr>

      <!-- Phase 4 -->
      <tr class="gtt-row">
        <td class="gtt-lbl">
          <div style="color:#00E676;font-weight:700;font-size:0.65em;">Phase 4 (เดือน 11–12)*</div>
          <div style="color:#FFF;font-weight:700;font-size:0.62em;margin-top:0.15em;">Data Catalog & Lifecycle</div>
          <div style="color:#78909C;font-size:0.52em;margin-top:0.25em;line-height:1.4;">Data Catalog กลาง · Lifecycle Workflow · Governance Dashboard</div>
          <div style="margin-top:0.3em;font-size:0.5em;color:#607080;">Data Map · Lifecycle Mgmt · AI-ready Foundation</div>
        </td>
        <td colspan="10" class="gtt-chart">
          <div class="gtt-grid"><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div></div>
          <div class="gtt-bars">
            <div class="gbar gb4" style="left:80.5%;width:18.5%;">Governance Portal</div>
          </div>
        </td>
      </tr>

    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Footer -->
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.5em;margin-top:0.8em;font-size:0.6em;">
    <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);padding:0.4em 0.8em;border-radius:20px;text-align:center;color:#00BCD4;font-weight:700;">
      ⚙️ Microsoft Graph API
    </div>
    <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);padding:0.4em 0.8em;border-radius:20px;text-align:center;color:#7C4DFF;font-weight:700;">
      🧠 Python NLP & LLMs
    </div>
    <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);padding:0.4em 0.8em;border-radius:20px;text-align:center;color:#FFB300;font-weight:700;">
      📊 Power BI / Dashboard
    </div>
    <div style="background:rgba(0,230,118,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.3);padding:0.4em 0.8em;border-radius:20px;text-align:center;color:#00E676;font-weight:700;">
```
